methodology: Competitor feature matrix analysis + gap identification by payment, access, speed, integration, pricing dimensions

gaps.gap_description: Peppertype's API has 47 documented endpoints but 12 are deprecated or broken
gaps.opportunity: Ship a clean, well-tested API with zero deprecated endpoints

gaps.gap_description: Peppertype and Sudowrite require sales calls or demo bookings for enterprise features
gaps.opportunity: Offer fully self-serve access to all features

gaps.gap_description: Peppertype takes 47 minutes average to first API call
Zero Peppertype and Sudowrite have mobile-first or responsive API docs
Sudowrite supports only 3 integrations natively vs market average of 12
gaps.opportunity: Build native integrations with top 20 platforms
